# HilbertRaum Corporate Contributor License Agreement (v1.1)

This Corporate Contributor License Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into by
the corporation or other legal entity identified below ("Corporation") for
the benefit of the HilbertRaum project (the "Project"). The "Project" means
the Maintainers identified in the HilbertRaum Individual CLA — the natural
persons acting under the GitHub accounts `humaniser` and `comilionas` — and,
upon assignment as provided there, the Successor Entity (planned: HilbertRaum
FlexCo, Austria). The Corporation consents in advance to such assignment of
this Agreement and the licenses granted herein.

The Corporation accepts and agrees to the following terms for the present and
future Contributions submitted to the Project by the Corporation's designated
employees listed in Schedule A. Schedule A may be updated by e-mail to the
Project; an update takes effect for Contributions submitted after the Project
confirms the dated change.

1. **Definitions.** "Contribution" and "Work" have the meaning given in the
   HilbertRaum Individual CLA.

2. **Grant of Copyright License.** The Corporation hereby grants to the
   Project a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free,
   irrevocable, transferable and sublicensable copyright license to
   reproduce, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly
   perform, distribute and make available the Contributions and such
   derivative works. This license to the Project expressly includes the
   right to license and distribute the Contributions and derivative works
   under any license terms, including open source licenses (such as
   GPL-3.0-or-later) and commercial or proprietary license terms (dual
   licensing). Recipients of software distributed by the Project receive the
   Contributions solely under the license terms the Project selects for the
   respective distribution (for the public repository: GPL-3.0-or-later).

3. **Grant of Patent License.** The Corporation hereby grants to the Project
   and to recipients of software distributed by the Project a perpetual,
   worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable (except as
   stated in this section) patent license to make, have made, use, offer to
   sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer the Work, where such license
   applies only to those patent claims licensable by the Corporation that
   are necessarily infringed by the Contributions alone or by combination of
   the Contributions with the Work to which they were submitted. If any
   entity institutes patent litigation against the Corporation or any other
   entity alleging that a Contribution, or the Work to which it was
   contributed, constitutes direct or contributory patent infringement, then
   any patent licenses granted to that entity under this Agreement for that
   Contribution or Work shall terminate as of the date such litigation is
   filed.

4. **Authority.** The person signing represents that they are authorized to
   enter into this Agreement on behalf of the Corporation. The Corporation
   represents that each designated employee is authorized to submit
   Contributions on its behalf.

5. **Employee Rights; Moral Rights.** The Corporation represents that it has
   secured from each designated employee all permissions, waivers, and
   rights necessary for the licenses granted in Sections 2 and 3, and that
   each designated employee has agreed, to the extent permitted by
   applicable law, not to assert moral rights
   (Urheberpersönlichkeitsrechte) against the Project or its licensees in a
   manner that would prevent the exercise of these licenses. Customary
   attribution in source files, commit history or notice files remains
   unaffected.

6. **Original Work; Third-Party Works.** The Corporation represents that
   each Contribution is an original creation of a designated employee or of
   the Corporation. Work that is not such an original creation may be
   submitted separately from any Contribution, identifying the complete
   details of its source and of any license or other restriction, and
   conspicuously marked as "Submitted on behalf of a third party: [named
   here]".

7. **Notification.** The Corporation agrees to notify the Project of any
   facts or circumstances of which it becomes aware that would make the
   above representations inaccurate in any respect.

8. **No Support Obligation; Disclaimer.** The Corporation is not expected to
   provide support for the Contributions. Unless required by applicable law
   or agreed to in writing, the Contributions are provided on an "AS IS"
   basis, without warranties or conditions of any kind.

9. **Governing Law.** This Agreement is governed by Austrian law, excluding
   its conflict-of-law rules and the UN Convention on Contracts for the
   International Sale of Goods. Place of jurisdiction is Graz, Austria.
